name: Three Lions: England's World Cup Story
parameter: England at the FIFA World Cup
angle: England face Mexico in tonight's Round of 16. Before kick-off, how well do you know the full story of the Three Lions at the World Cup — the glory, the heartbreak, the penalties, and the moments that still sting decades later?

questions.question: In which year did England win their one and only FIFA World Cup?
What was the final score when England beat West Germany in the 1966 World Cup Final at Wembley?
Geoff Hurst scored the only hat-trick in World Cup Final history in 1966. Who scored England's other goal in that final?
Which England manager led the Three Lions to their 1966 World Cup triumph?
England reached the World Cup semi-finals in 1990, losing to which country on penalties?
Paul Gascoigne was in tears during the 1990 semi-final after receiving a yellow card. Why did the booking devastate him in that moment?

options.A: It meant he would have been suspended for the final if England had won
options.B: It was his second yellow of the tournament, ending his World Cup
options.C: It was the harshest booking he had ever received in his career
options.D: He had promised his manager he would stay disciplined all tournament

questions.question: Which England striker won the Golden Boot at the 1986 World Cup in Mexico with six goals?
David Beckham was sent off for a kick at Diego Simeone at the 1998 World Cup, leaving England to play most of the match with ten men. Which country were England playing?
In the 2010 World Cup, Frank Lampard's shot clearly crossed the goal line but was not awarded. Which country were England playing when it happened?
Harry Kane won the 2018 World Cup Golden Boot with six goals, helping England reach the semi-finals. Which manager led England to that campaign?
England actually went behind in the 1966 World Cup Final before coming back to win 4-2. Which West German player opened the scoring?
How many times have England failed to qualify for the FIFA World Cup finals?
England have been knocked out of the World Cup on penalties on three separate occasions. Which answer correctly names all three opponents?
Geoff Hurst's controversial second goal in the 1966 Final — the shot that hit the crossbar and bounced on the line — was awarded by a linesman from which country?
England's 1990 World Cup shootout exit against West Germany remains one of the defining moments of English football. Which two players missed the decisive penalties?

sources: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/1966_FIFA_World_Cup_Final (England 4-2 West Germany AET; Haller 12', Hurst 18', Peters 78', Weber 90', Hurst 101', Hurst 120'; only hat-trick in a WC Final)
https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Alf_Ramsey (manager of England 1963-1974; knighted after 1966 win)
https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/1990_FIFA_World_Cup#Semi-finals (England 1-1 West Germany AET; lost 3-4 on pens; Pearce and Waddle missed)
https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Paul_Gascoigne (Gascoigne booked in SF = would have been suspended for the final)
https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tofiq_Bahramov (Soviet Union linesman who awarded Hurst's controversial goal; actually Azerbaijani)
